title: Hollow Core
body: HollowCore is a minecraft modding library by [HollowHorizon](https://github.com/HollowHorizon). It is an easy to use and powerful library for easier creation of minecraft mods for Fabric, Forge and NeoForge. ## Features ### Multi versional HollowCore is now running on 1.21, 1.20.1 and 1.19.2 (WIP) by the Forge, Fabric and NeoForge loaders. ### Integration with ModLoaders - Universal Registration system to register blocks, items, block entities, etc. using kotlin delegates. - Universal Packet system with automatic serialization and registration using annotations. - Universal Capabilities system to storing nbt in entities, block entities and worlds. - Universal EventBus system for all modloaders and basic events. ### Easier development - Automatic models generation for blocks and items using embed resourcepack. - NBT serialization and deserialization of any objects using Kotlinx.Serialization. - Toml Config system based on KotlinX Serialization. - Automatic sounds.json generation. ### Graphics - ImGui based framework: basic elements, items, entities, containers, slots, etc. - Async GLTF model loader with skeletal animations, skinning, morph targets, PBR materials with Iris/Oculus support. - Effekseer particles support. - Gif textures. - MP3, OGG, WAV Sound formats support.
